scripts.build:dev: rm -rf build && webpack --config webpack.dev.js && cp popup.html build/unpacked/popup.html && cp manifest.json build/unpacked/manifest.json && cp assets/logo48.png build/unpacked/logo48.png && cp assets/logo128.png build/unpacked/logo128.png
scripts.build:prod: rm -rf build && webpack --config webpack.prod.js && cp popup.html build/unpacked/popup.html && cp manifest.json build/unpacked/manifest.json && cp assets/logo48.png build/unpacked/logo48.png && cp assets/logo128.png build/unpacked/logo128.png && cd build/unpacked && zip -r ../packed.zip .
